---
title: confusing-results
description: "Name adjacent results of the same type."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Name adjacent results of the same type. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
func bounds() (int, int)
```

## Good

```go
func bounds() (min int, max int)
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only confusing-results`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
